pr.title: RHOAIENG-62241: AutoML UI: Discrepancy between what user see in the message window vs what actually happens with the run after stop is clicked
pr.body:
The KFP backend does not implement cancellation handling for AutoML/AutoRAG
pipeline runs. When a user stops a run, the final status is "Failed" rather
than "Canceled". This updates the confirmation modal text in both the AutoML
and AutoRAG packages to accurately reflect the actual outcome, changing
"the run will be marked as canceled" to "the run will be marked as failed".

Closes [RHOAIENG-62241](https://redhat.atlassian.net/browse/RHOAIENG-62241)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Nikhil Sharma <nikhisha@redhat.com>

<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->

## Summary by CodeRabbit

* **Bug Fixes**
  * Updated stop run confirmation messaging to indicate that stopping a pipeline will mark the run as failed.

* **Tests**
  * Added test verification for stop run confirmation messaging.

<!-- end of auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->
